user.title: ESO account
user.description: Sign in with your ESO self-service account (https://mano.eso.lt). These are the same credentials you use to log in to the ESO website.

data_description.username: Your ESO (mano.eso.lt) username or email address.
data_description.password: Your ESO account password. It is verified before continuing.

imap.title: Two-factor authentication (email)
imap.description: ESO emails a one-time code on every login, so a mailbox is required. Enter the mailbox that receives those codes so Home Assistant can read them automatically. For Gmail you must create an App Password (https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/185833) — your normal password will not work.

data_description.imap_username: The mailbox login that receives ESO 2FA codes (e.g. your.name@gmail.com).
data_description.imap_password: Mailbox password. For Gmail/Google use an App Password, not your account password.
data_description.sender: Only emails from this address are searched for the code.

objects.title: Select objects
objects.description: These metering points (objects) were discovered on your ESO account, named after their address. Choose which ones to track in Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconfigure ESO account
reauth_confirm.description: ESO now requires email two-factor authentication for {username}. Confirm your password and add the mailbox that receives the one-time codes. For Gmail use an App Password (https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/185833).

data_description.imap_username: The mailbox login that receives ESO 2FA codes.
data_description.imap_password: Mailbox password. For Gmail/Google use an App Password.
data_description.sender: Only emails from this address are searched for the code.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to ESO. Please try again.
error.imap_required: Mailbox username and password are required for two-factor authentication.
error.twofa_failed: Could not complete two-factor login. Check your mailbox (IMAP) settings and that the App Password is correct.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This ESO account is already configured.
abort.no_objects: No objects were found on this ESO account.

init.title: Update credentials
init.description: Update the ESO password and mailbox (2FA) settings for {username}. To use a different ESO account, add a new integration entry instead.

data_description.imap_username: The mailbox login that receives ESO 2FA codes.
data_description.imap_password: Mailbox password. For Gmail/Google use an App Password.
data_description.sender: Only emails from this address are searched for the code.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to ESO. Please try again.
error.imap_required: Mailbox username and password are required for two-factor authentication.
error.twofa_failed: Could not complete two-factor login. Check your mailbox (IMAP) settings and that the App Password is correct.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

user.title: Add object
user.description: Choose a metering point (object) discovered on your ESO account to add. Each is named after its address.

data_description.name: Name shown in the energy dashboard.
data_description.consumed: Generate statistics for energy consumed from the grid.
data_description.returned: Generate statistics for energy returned to the grid.
data_description.price_entity: Optional sensor tracking electricity price; enables a cost statistic.
data_description.price_currency: Currency for the cost statistic (e.g. EUR).

data_description.name: Name shown in the energy dashboard.
data_description.consumed: Generate statistics for energy consumed from the grid.
data_description.returned: Generate statistics for energy returned to the grid.
data_description.price_entity: Optional sensor tracking electricity price; enables a cost statistic.
data_description.price_currency: Currency for the cost statistic (e.g. EUR).

abort.all_configured: All discovered objects are already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to ESO. Please try again.
abort.twofa_failed: Could not complete two-factor login. Check the account's mailbox (IMAP) settings.
abort.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

import_now.name: Import now
import_now.description: Logs in to ESO and imports the latest consumption statistics on demand.

config_entry_id.name: ESO account
config_entry_id.description: The ESO account(s) to import. Leave empty to import all configured accounts.

confirm.title: Remove the ESO YAML configuration
confirm.description:
Configuring ESO via configuration.yaml is deprecated. Your existing configuration has been imported and the integration is now available under Settings → Devices & Services.

Remove the `eso:` block from configuration.yaml and restart Home Assistant, then submit to dismiss this issue.
